en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID, WHEN NATHAN THE PROPHET WENT TO HIM, AFTER HE HAD GONE IN TO BATHSHEBA. Have mercy on me, O God, according to your steadfast love; according to your abundant mercy blot out my transgressions.
zh: 神啊！求你按著你的慈愛恩待我， 照著你豐盛的憐憫塗抹我的過犯。

en: Wash me thoroughly from my iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin!
zh: 求你徹底洗淨我的罪孽， 潔除我的罪。

en: For I know my transgressions, and my sin is ever before me.
zh: 因為我知道我的過犯； 我的罪常在我面前。

en: Against you, you only, have I sinned and done what is evil in your sight, so that you may be justified in your words and blameless in your judgment.
zh: 我得罪了你，唯獨得罪你； 我行了你眼中看為惡的事， 因此，你宣判的時候，顯為公義； 你審判的時候，顯為清正。

en: Behold, I was brought forth in iniquity, and in sin did my mother conceive me.
zh: 看哪，我是在罪孽裡生的； 我母親在罪中懷了我。

en: Behold, you delight in truth in the inward being, and you teach me wisdom in the secret heart.
zh: 看哪！你喜愛的是內心的誠實； 在我內心的隱密處，你使我得智慧。

en: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean; wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.
zh: 求你用牛膝草潔淨我，我就乾淨； 求你洗淨我，我就比雪更白。

en: Let me hear joy and gladness; let the bones that you have broken rejoice.
zh: 求你使我聽見歡喜和快樂的聲音， 使你所壓傷的骨頭可以歡呼。

en: Hide your face from my sins, and blot out all my iniquities.
zh: 求你掩面不看我的罪惡， 求你塗抹我的一切罪孽。

en: Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a right spirit within me.
zh: 神啊！求你為我造一顆清潔的心， 求你使我裡面重新有堅定的靈。

en: Cast me not away from your presence, and take not your Holy Spirit from me.
zh: 不要把我從你面前丟棄， 不要從我身上收回你的聖靈。

en: Restore to me the joy of your salvation, and uphold me with a willing spirit.
zh: 求你使我重得你救恩的喜樂， 重新有樂意的靈支持我。

en: Then I will teach transgressors your ways, and sinners will return to you.
zh: 我就必把你的道指教有過犯的人， 罪人必回轉歸向你。

en: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, O God of my salvation, and my tongue will sing aloud of your righteousness.
zh: 神啊！你是拯救我的 神， 求你救我脫離流人血的罪； 我的舌頭就必頌揚你的公義。

en: O Lord, open my lips, and my mouth will declare your praise.
zh: 主啊！求你開我的嘴， 使我的口宣揚讚美你的話。

en: For you will not delight in sacrifice, or I would give it; you will not be pleased with a burnt offering.
zh: 因為你不喜愛祭物； 我就是獻上燔祭，你也不喜悅。

en: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit; a broken and contrite heart, O God, you will not despise.
zh: 神所要的祭，就是破碎的靈； 神啊！破碎痛悔的心，你必不輕看。

en: Do good to Zion in your good pleasure; build up the walls of Jerusalem;
zh: 求你按著你的美意善待錫安； 求你修築耶路撒冷的城牆。

en: then will you delight in right sacrifices, in burnt offerings and whole burnt offerings; then bulls will be offered on your altar.
zh: 那時，你必悅納公義的祭、燔祭和全牲的燔祭； 那時，人必把公牛獻在你的祭壇上。
